Skip to content
piamInterfaces 0.59.0
  • Reference

Retrieves all variables allocated to source potentially used in mappings to project variables

Source: R/getMappingVariables.R
getMappingVariables.Rd

Retrieves all variables allocated to source potentially used in mappings to project variables

Usage

getMappingVariables(project = TRUE, sources = TRUE, addunit = TRUE)

Arguments

project

name of the project of requested mappings such as c('AR6', 'AR6_NGFS') or 'mapping.csv'. Use TRUE for all mappings.

sources

model abbreviation(s) used in 'source' column. R = REMIND, M = MAgPIE, T = EDGE-T, B = Brick, C = Climate/MAGICC, TRUE = all

addunit

boolean whether units should be appended as 'Variable (Unit)'

Author

Falk Benke, Oliver Richters

Examples

getMappingVariables("AR6", "RT")
#>   [1] "Cap|Electricity (GW)"                                                                     
#>   [2] "Cap|Electricity|+|Biomass (GW)"                                                           
#>   [3] "Cap|Electricity|+|Coal (GW)"                                                              
#>   [4] "Cap|Electricity|+|Gas (GW)"                                                               
#>   [5] "Cap|Electricity|+|Geothermal (GW)"                                                        
#>   [6] "Cap|Electricity|+|Hydro (GW)"                                                             
#>   [7] "Cap|Electricity|+|Hydrogen (GW)"                                                          
#>   [8] "Cap|Electricity|+|Nuclear (GW)"                                                           
#>   [9] "Cap|Electricity|+|Solar (GW)"                                                             
#>  [10] "Cap|Electricity|+|Wind (GW)"                                                              
#>  [11] "Cap|Electricity|Biomass|w/ CC (GW)"                                                       
#>  [12] "Cap|Electricity|Biomass|w/o CC (GW)"                                                      
#>  [13] "Cap|Electricity|Coal|+|w/ CC (GW)"                                                        
#>  [14] "Cap|Electricity|Coal|+|w/o CC (GW)"                                                       
#>  [15] "Cap|Electricity|Gas|+|w/ CC (GW)"                                                         
#>  [16] "Cap|Electricity|Gas|+|w/o CC (GW)"                                                        
#>  [17] "Cap|Electricity|Oil|w/o CC (GW)"                                                          
#>  [18] "Cap|Electricity|Solar|+|CSP (GW)"                                                         
#>  [19] "Cap|Electricity|Solar|+|PV (GW)"                                                          
#>  [20] "Cap|Electricity|Storage|Battery (GW)"                                                     
#>  [21] "Cap|Electricity|Wind|+|Offshore (GW)"                                                     
#>  [22] "Cap|Electricity|Wind|+|Onshore (GW)"                                                      
#>  [23] "Cap|Gases (GW)"                                                                           
#>  [24] "Cap|Gases|+|Biomass (GW)"                                                                 
#>  [25] "Cap|Gases|+|Coal (GW)"                                                                    
#>  [26] "Cap|Hydrogen (GW)"                                                                        
#>  [27] "Cap|Hydrogen|+|Biomass (GW)"                                                              
#>  [28] "Cap|Hydrogen|+|Coal (GW)"                                                                 
#>  [29] "Cap|Hydrogen|+|Electricity (GW)"                                                          
#>  [30] "Cap|Hydrogen|+|Gas (GW)"                                                                  
#>  [31] "Cap|Hydrogen|Biomass|+|w/ CC (GW)"                                                        
#>  [32] "Cap|Hydrogen|Biomass|+|w/o CC (GW)"                                                       
#>  [33] "Cap|Hydrogen|Coal|+|w/ CC (GW)"                                                           
#>  [34] "Cap|Hydrogen|Coal|+|w/o CC (GW)"                                                          
#>  [35] "Cap|Hydrogen|Gas|+|w/ CC (GW)"                                                            
#>  [36] "Cap|Hydrogen|Gas|+|w/o CC (GW)"                                                           
#>  [37] "Cap|Liquids (GW)"                                                                         
#>  [38] "Cap|Liquids|+|Biomass (GW)"                                                               
#>  [39] "Cap|Liquids|+|Coal (GW)"                                                                  
#>  [40] "Cap|Liquids|+|Oil (GW)"

#>  [52] "Carbon Management|Storage|Energy|Pe2Se|Biomass|+|Hydrogen w/ couple prod (Mt CO2/yr)"     
#>  [53] "Carbon Management|Storage|Energy|Pe2Se|Biomass|+|Liquids w/ couple prod (Mt CO2/yr)"

#>  [60] "Consumption (billion US$2017/yr)"                                                         
#>  [61] "Cumulative Cap|Electricity|+|Biomass (GW)"                                                
#>  [62] "Cumulative Cap|Electricity|+|Coal (GW)"                                                   
#>  [63] "Cumulative Cap|Electricity|+|Gas (GW)"
